bird.name: Scaled ground cuckoo
bird.summary: The scaled ground cuckoo (Neomorphus squamiger) is a species of cuckoo in the tribe Neomorphini of subfamily Crotophaginae. It is endemic t…

relations.subject: Scaled ground cuckoo
relations.evidence: That species as a whole is assessed as Vulnerable due to forest fragmentation and destruction because it requires large undisturbed forest. Because so many details of the species' life history are unknown, its exact status is uncertain, but with its very small range and restricted habitat requirements it is "highly sensitive to human disturbance."
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
